title: caryocar glabrum subsp. glabrum
intro: Caryocar glabrum subsp. glabrum is a subspecies of the Caryocar glabrum plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Caryocaraceae, native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of the plant include its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Caryocar glabrum subsp. glabrum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, and its oil can also be extracted for external application.
